title: Flavorful Greek Lamb Wrap
description: A briny and juicy Greek dish featuring slow-cooked lamb with shoyu-koji, wrapped in a corn husk, perfect for midnight cravings. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is a twist on traditional Greek cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with dried oregano and shoyu-koji.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Seal the lamb shoulder on all sides until browned.
Add lemon juice and garlic to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and slow cook for 2 hours.
Prepare the corn husks by soaking them in water for 30 minutes.
Shred the cooked lamb and mix with diced tomato and crumbly feta cheese.
Fill each corn husk with the lamb mixture and serve hot.
